title: CRM Property Stack + KPI Stack — Operational Translation
summary: The CRM data model the five-step method needs: discovery fields (buyer vector components), trust fields (burned-by pattern, shared standard), objection fields (comparison set, frame clarified yes/no), close fields (next committed action, signal-to-action lag). Plus ten KPIs that operationalize all five engines — Ask Execution Rate, Signal-to-Action Lag, Frame Clarification Rate, Standard Alignment Capture Rate, Discovery Resolution Score, Proposal Match Score, Stakeholder Activation Rate, Undefined Deal Days, Discount-Before-Diagnosis Rate, Trust-Speed Score. Candidate next-module specification for Andre Sales Command Center.
